# Mirat Can Bayrak

> Personal site and blog of Mirat Can Bayrak (Miro) — full-stack developer (Python, Django, TypeScript, React), solopreneur, and dad. Writing about software, side projects, indie hacking, and personal notes in English and Turkish.

## Main

- [Home](https://mirat.dev/): Intro, links, and availability.
- [Articles](https://mirat.dev/articles/): All blog posts, filterable by tag and language.
- [Projects](https://mirat.dev/projects/): Selected software projects.
- [Resume](https://mirat.dev/resume/): Professional background and experience.
- [Links](https://mirat.dev/links/): Curated links.

## Notes

- Content is authored by Mirat Can Bayrak.
- Turkish articles keep their original language because cultural nuance does not translate well.
- Older archived articles are kept for historical/nostalgic reasons and may be outdated.
